title: skills.registry.json — the routing + dependency graph
description: Generated from SKILL.md frontmatter by 09-tools/build-registry.py. Never hand-edit. Encodes how any agent computes the ordered skill load set for a request. See AGENTS.md 'Skill loading precedence' and 02-shared-references/skill-frontmatter.md.

spec_version.description: Frontmatter contract version this was built against.

tier_rank.description: Load-order rank per tier; lower loads first.

tier.description: Load class. null = not yet migrated to frontmatter v2.

prerequisites.description: Hard load-before edges. The resolver walks these transitively to roots.

related.description: Soft cross-references. Surfaced as suggestions, never auto-loaded.

governed_by.description: Cross-cutting lenses (a11y, visual-qa) applied after this skill produces output.

surfaces.description: Where the skill is valid. ['*'] = all surfaces.

hash.description: sha256 of the SKILL.md for integrity/drift.

load_chains.description: skill-name -> precomputed ordered ancestor+self list (foundations first). Lets a weak/offline agent skip the toposort.
